{{Infobox madra
| name = Storm madra
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Storm madra Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Storm [[madra]] is a versatile and potent form of spiritual energy characterized by its association with lightning, wind, and tempestuous weather. It manifests in various colors, including blue, yellow, sapphire, and multicolored hues that can appear as dense, tangible lightning. This [[madra]] is used by various practitioners, such as the [[Stormcaller]] and the [[Sage of Calling Storms]], to execute techniques ranging from projectile lightning blasts and defensive shields to large-scale environmental manipulations. It can also take the form of living constructions, such as lightning falcons, serpentine [[dragons]], or massive storm clouds with humanoid limbs. The [[essence]] of storm [[madra]] is closely linked to the [[Weeping Dragon]], a [[Dreadgod]] whose power can manifest as millions of tiny, parasitic lightning serpents or massive storm-[[dragon]] constructions. Such manifestations can be used to consume the spiritual power of others, effectively blighting landscapes like a swarm of locusts. Additionally, storm [[madra]] can be concentrated within specialized objects like the [[Storm Core]] or the [[Tempest Jar]]. In its most extreme forms, it can appear as a colossal, mountain-straddling figure of gray-white energy or as absolute black clouds paired with stark white lightning.}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|A lightning falcon detonated into a field of storm [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17">''Uncrowned'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Storm madra]] can be composed of many lesser aspects woven together.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Powerful storm [[madra]] appeared over the cloud fortress.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A river of storm [[madra]] crashed down on the ship from a portal.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|During the events of [[Waybound]], [[Yushi]] begins to crackle with storm [[madra]]. This energy can be discharged in the form of bolts. The [[Weeping Dragon]] eventually directs storm [[madra]] to shoot up through [[Lindon]]'s feet. This power is seen bursting in uncontrolled flares from mangled madra channels, and [[Wavedancer]] is also capable of holding storm [[madra]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yushi]] crackles with storm [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Storm madra]] can be shot as bolts.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]] sent storm [[madra]] shooting up [[Lindon]]’s feet.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Storm madra]] was bursting from the mangled madra channels in uncontrolled flares.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Wavedancer]] holds storm [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Storm madra]] can seize a person.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
